docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,947.54 FILED BY KHETRAPAL, SAURABH AS TO DEFENDANT VARMA, MANISH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE AND REQUEST TO RESET COURT DATE; FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHETRAPAL, SAURABH
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-03-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-12-2011 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHETRAPAL, SAURABH
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-30-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-03-2011 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHETRAPAL, SAURABH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VARMA, MANISH $1,947.54 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,072.54, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHETRAPAL, SAURABH AS TO DEFENDANT VARMA, MANISH
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VARMA, MANISH
